_doc: Core Set 2020 (M20) booster recipe. Generated by scripts/gen-booster-contents.mjs from data/_collation-facts/m20.json (source: The Collation Project, lethe.xyz/mtg/collation). Edit the facts file and regenerate; do not hand-edit this file unless you also remove its facts source. Set composition: 101C / 80U / 53R / 15M. Collation: sequential, C1/C2 commons. Occasional foil (1:45) modelled by folding foil odds into one common slot. Notes: Core set. Normal large-set size plus 11 extra common lands. Four basic land variations. Printed USA and Belgium. 36 packs per box.

draft.tagline: 10 commons · 3 uncommons · 1× rare/mythic · 1 basic land · foil 1:45
